global_description: Medium-sized bird with a streamlined, torpedo-shaped body, predominantly black and white plumage, adapted for swimming. The back and head are black, while the belly is white. It has short, flipper-like wings, a short tail, and webbed feet for efficient movement in water.

part_details.head: Black with a white face and a small, pointed beak
part_details.body: Streamlined, black back and white belly
